title: get health endpoint returns basic health status
description: Verify that a GET request to /health returns a 200 status code with a basic health status object indicating the API is operational.

title: get health db endpoint returns database diagnostics
description: Verify that a GET request to /health/db returns a 200 status code with database provider, schema, and connection-name diagnostics when using a relational database provider.

title: get health db endpoint returns error on inmemory provider
description: Verify that a GET request to /health/db returns a 500 status code with an error envelope indicating relational diagnostics are unavailable when the backend uses the InMemory database provider.
